title: Workbuddy Hooks Configuration (issue #262)
description: Schema for ~/.config/workbuddy/hooks.yaml. Hooks are coordinator-host-level: only the operator who deploys workbuddy can edit this file. PR contributors cannot inject hooks. Per-repo .github/workbuddy/hooks/ is intentionally NOT supported. Keep in sync with internal/hooks/config.go.

schema_version.description: Top-level config schema version. Optional; defaults to 1.

hooks.description: List of hook definitions. Order is irrelevant; hooks fire concurrently.

name.description: Stable identifier. Used in CLI (`workbuddy hooks list/test/status`), metrics (`workbuddy_hook_invocations_total{hook="<name>"}`), and `hook_disabled` event payloads. Must be unique across the file.

enabled.description: Set false to keep the definition but skip dispatch. Auto-disable on N consecutive failures (see hook_disabled event) is a separate runtime flag and does not modify this field.

items.description: Event type from internal/eventlog/eventlog.go (e.g. `state_entry`, `dispatch`, `completed`, `alert`, `dev_review_cycle_cap_reached`, `dispatch_blocked_by_dependency`, `infra_failure`, `issue_restarted`, `worker_registered`, `coordinator_started`, `coordinator_stopping`, `config_reloaded`). The literal `*` matches all events except those with the `hook_` prefix (which are filtered to prevent self-amplification). `poll_cycle_done` is allowed but documented as 'not recommended' due to volume.

match.description: Optional pre-action filter. Applied AFTER event-type matching. All present fields must match (AND).

severity.description: Only meaningful when the event is `alert`. Other event types ignore this filter.

repo.description: Glob pattern matched against payload.repo (e.g. `Lincyaw/*`, `*`). Empty/missing means match-all.

timeout.description: Go time.Duration. After timeout: SIGTERM, then SIGKILL after a 2s grace (command actions); HTTP request cancelled (webhook actions).

action.description: Action to execute when an event matches. Action types are pluggable via internal/hooks/action.go ActionRegistry; new types require code changes but no dispatcher changes.

url.description: Target URL. The dispatcher POSTs the v1 event payload as application/json. HTTP 2xx is success; anything else (incl. timeout) is failure.

headers.description: Optional headers. Values support `${ENV_VAR}` substitution at coordinator startup (resolved against the coordinator's environment, not the caller's request). Missing env vars resolve to empty string and emit a startup warning.

method.description: HTTP method. Defaults to POST; PUT supported for idempotent receivers.

cmd.description: argv. cmd[0] is the executable; remaining items are literal arguments (no shell expansion). The dispatcher writes the v1 event payload to stdin as JSON. Env: process inherits coordinator env plus `WORKBUDDY_EVENT_TYPE`, `WORKBUDDY_REPO`, `WORKBUDDY_ISSUE_NUM`, `WORKBUDDY_HOOK_NAME`. Non-zero exit code = failure.

cwd.description: Working directory. Defaults to the coordinator's working directory.
